systems_thinking_description: Adjust numbers such as budgets rates thresholds or capacities
resilience_contribution: Can improve performance but may not change vulnerability structure

systems_thinking_description: Increase stock sizes such as reserves backups savings or ecological capacity
resilience_contribution: Improves disturbance absorption and buys adaptation time

systems_thinking_description: Change who receives what feedback and when
resilience_contribution: Improves early warning accountability learning and response

systems_thinking_description: Change incentives constraints rights and governance procedures
resilience_contribution: Alters recurring behaviors that produce risk or adaptation

systems_thinking_description: Change what the system optimizes for
resilience_contribution: Shifts from efficiency or growth toward viability justice and ecological limits

systems_thinking_description: Change the underlying worldview mental model or purpose
resilience_contribution: Redefines what counts as resilience and what must transform
